verses.arabic: In the name of the Father
and the Son
and the Spirit
the Holy
One God, Amen
I love my Lord Jesus Christ
I love the Virgin
I love my father
I love my mother
I love my brother
I love my sister
In all these things we are more than conquerors through him who loved us (Rom 8:37)
In the name of the Father
and the Son
and the Spirit
the Holy
One God, Amen
I want to pray
I want to eat
I want to sleep
I want to drink
I want to play
In all these things we are more than conquerors through him who loved us (Rom 8:37)

verses.coptic: 'en `vran `m`viwt Nem `p]hri Nem Pi`pneuma Eqouab Ounou; `nouwt amhn
verses.arabic: In the name of the Father, and the Son, and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
verses.phonetic: Khen efran em-efiout nem epshiri nem pi-epnevma ethouab ounouti enouot amin

verses.arabic: I am the light of the world
I am the bread of life

verses.coptic: Jem;pi ouo\ anau je ou\elje pe `psoic
verses.arabic: Taste and see that the Lord is good
verses.phonetic: Jem-tipi ouoh anav je ou-helje pe ep-chois

verses.arabic: Take heed to yourself and to the doctrine
Be ready
Having the eyes of your hearts enlightened

verses.coptic: 'en `vran `m`viwt Nem `p]hri Nem Pi`pneuma Eqouab Ounou; `nouwt amhn
verses.arabic: In the name of the Father, and the Son, and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
verses.phonetic: Khen efran em-efiout nem epshiri nem pi-epnevma ethouab ounouti enouot amin

verses.arabic: This is the day the Lord has made
verses.phonetic: Phai pe pi-ehoou eta ep-chois thamiof

verses.arabic: I am the light of the world
I am the bread of life

verses.coptic: Jem;pi ouo\ anau je ou\elje pe `psoic
verses.arabic: Taste and see that the Lord is good
verses.phonetic: Jem-tipi ouoh anav je ou-helje pe ep-chois

verses.arabic: Take heed to yourself and to the doctrine
Be ready
Having the eyes of your hearts enlightened
In all these things we are more than conquerors through him who loved us (Rom 8:37)

verses.arabic: In the name of the Father, and the Son, and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
verses.phonetic: Khen efran em-efiout nem epshiri nem pi-epnevma ethouab ounouti enouot amin

verses.coptic: Ouwn\ `ebol `mP_ je ouxrhctoc ou`agaqoc pe allhloui`a>
verses.arabic: Give thanks to the Lord, for He is good, for He is kind, Alleluia.
verses.phonetic: Ouwnh evol em-epchois je ou-khristos ou-aghathos pe allelouia

verses.arabic: For His mercy endures forever
Give thanks to the God of gods, Alleluia: for His mercy endures forever
verses.phonetic: Ouwnh evol em-efnouti ente ni-nouti allelouia je pefnai shop sha eneh

verses.arabic: I am the light of the world
I am the bread of life

verses.coptic: Jem;pi ouo\ anau je ou\elje pe `psoic
verses.arabic: Taste and see that the Lord is good
verses.phonetic: Jem-tipi ouoh anav je ou-helje pe ep-chois

verses.arabic: Take heed to yourself and to the doctrine
Be ready
Having the eyes of your hearts enlightened

verses.coptic: 'en `vran `m`viwt Nem `p]hri Nem Pi`pneuma Eqouab Ounou; `nouwt amhn
verses.arabic: In the name of the Father, and the Son, and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
verses.phonetic: Khen efran em-efiout nem epshiri nem pi-epnevma ethouab ounouti enouot amin

verses.arabic: Our Father who art in heaven
Hallowed be Thy name
Thy kingdom come
Thy will be done, on earth as it is in heaven
verses.phonetic: Petehnak maref-shopi em-ef-riti khen et-fe nem hijen pi-kahi

verses.arabic: Give us this day our daily bread
verses.phonetic: Pen-wik ente rasti meif nan em-phoou

verses.arabic: And forgive us our trespasses
As we forgive those who trespass against us
verses.phonetic: Em-ef-riti hon enten-ko evol en-ni-ete ouon entan erwou

verses.arabic: And lead us not into temptation
But deliver us from the evil one
In Christ Jesus our Lord

verses.coptic: Je qwk te ;metouro> nem ;jom> nem pi`wou> ]a `ene\> amhn
verses.arabic: For Thine is the kingdom, the power, and the glory, forever. Amen.
verses.phonetic: Je thok te ti-met-ouro nem ti-gom nem pi-wou sha eneh. Amin.

verses.arabic: I am the light of the world
I am the bread of life

verses.coptic: Jem;pi ouo\ anau je ou\elje pe `psoic
verses.arabic: Taste and see that the Lord is good
verses.phonetic: Jem-tipi ouoh anav je ou-helje pe ep-chois

verses.arabic: Take heed to yourself and to the doctrine
Be ready
Having the eyes of your hearts enlightened
In all these things we are more than conquerors through him who loved us (Rom 8:37)

verses.coptic: 'en `vran `m`viwt Nem `p]hri Nem Pi`pneuma Eqouab Ounou; `nouwt amhn
verses.arabic: In the name of the Father, and the Son, and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
verses.phonetic: Khen efran em-efiout nem epshiri nem pi-epnevma ethouab ounouti enouot amin

verses.coptic: Ouckhnh `mmhi> te Maria ;parqenoc> euxh 'en tecmh;> `nje nimetmeqreu `eten\ot.
verses.arabic: A true tabernacle is Mary the Virgin, wherein are placed the true testimonies.
verses.phonetic: Ou-skene em-mi te Maria ti-parthenos ev-ki khen tes-meti enje ni-met-methreu eten-hot

verses.arabic: The undefiled Ark, overlaid with gold on all sides, and the mercy seat of the Cherubim.
verses.phonetic: Ti-kivotos en-at-thouleb etoshg en-noub en-sasa niven nem pi-ilastirion en-sheroubimikon

verses.coptic: Pictamnoc `nnoub> ere pimanna \hp `n'htf> ic pilogoc `nte `viwt> `i afsicar[ `n'h;.
verses.arabic: The golden pot, wherein the manna was hidden, is the Word of the Father, who came and took flesh of you.
verses.phonetic: Pi-stamnios en-noub ere pi-manna hip en-khitf is pi-loghos ente ef-iot e af-chi-sarx en-khiti

verses.coptic: Jem;pi ouo\ anau je ou\elje pe `psoic
verses.arabic: Taste and see that the Lord is good
verses.phonetic: Jem-tipi ouoh anav je ou-helje pe ep-chois

verses.arabic: Take heed to yourself and to the doctrine
Be ready
Having the eyes of your hearts enlightened
In all these things we are more than conquerors through him who loved us (Rom 8:37)

verses.coptic: 'en `vran `m`viwt Nem `p]hri Nem Pi`pneuma Eqouab Ounou; `nouwt amhn
verses.arabic: In the name of the Father, and the Son, and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
verses.phonetic: Khen efran em-efiout nem epshiri nem pi-epnevma ethouab ounouti enouot amin

verses.coptic: :atqwleb `ncemne> ouo\ eqouab 'en \wb niben> Qhetac`ini nan `m`vnou;> eftalhout `ejen nec`jvoi.
verses.arabic: O pure and chaste one, and holy in all things, you who brought us God, carried on your arms.
verses.phonetic: Ti-at-thouleb en-semne ouoh ethouab khen hob niven thi-etas-ini nan em-efnouti ef-tale-iout ejen nes-egvoi

verses.coptic: `Cra]I neme `nje ;kthcic thrc> Ecw] `ebol ecjw `mmoc> je xere qheqme\ `n\mot> Ouo\ ` Psoic ]op neme.
verses.arabic: Rejoice with us, O all creation, crying out and saying: Hail to you, O full of grace, the Lord is with you.
verses.phonetic: Esrashi neme enje ti-ktisis tirs es-osh evol esgo em-mos je shere thi-ethmeh en-hmot ouoh epchois shop neme

verses.coptic: Xere qheqme\ `n`\mot> xere qhetcajem `\mot> xere qhetacmec Pixrictoc> ouo\ ` Psoic ]op neme
verses.arabic: Hail to you, O full of grace; Hail to you, who have found grace; Hail to you, who have given birth to Christ; the Lord is with you.
verses.phonetic: Shere thi-ethmeh en-hmot shere thi-etas-ajem hmot shere thi-etas-mes pi-khristos ouoh ep-chois shop neme

verses.coptic: Jem;pi ouo\ anau je ou\elje pe `psoic
verses.arabic: Taste and see that the Lord is good
verses.phonetic: Jem-tipi ouoh anav je ou-helje pe ep-chois

verses.arabic: Take heed to yourself and to the doctrine
Be ready
Having the eyes of your hearts enlightened

verses.coptic: 'en `vran `m`viwt Nem `p]hri Nem Pi`pneuma Eqouab Ounou; `nouwt amhn
verses.arabic: In the name of the Father, and the Son, and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
verses.phonetic: Khen efran em-efiout nem epshiri nem pi-epnevma ethouab ounouti enouot amin

verses.coptic: :atqwleb `ncemne> ouo\ eqouab 'en \wb niben> Qhetac`ini nan `m`vnou;> eftalhout `ejen nec`jvoi.
verses.arabic: O pure and chaste one, and holy in all things, you who brought us God, carried on your arms.

verses.phonetic: Esrashi neme enje ti-ktisis tirs es-osh evol es-go em-mos je shere thi-ethmeh en-hmot ouoh epchois shop neme

verses.coptic: Xere qheqme\ `n`\mot> xere qhetcajem `\mot> xere qhetacmec Pixrictoc> ouo\ ` Psoic ]op neme
verses.arabic: Hail to you, O full of grace; Hail to you, who have found grace; Hail to you, who have given birth to Christ; the Lord is with you.
verses.phonetic: Shere thi-ethmeh en-hmot shere thi-etas-ajem hmot shere thi-etas-mes pi-khristos ouoh ep-chois shop neme

verses.coptic: Tenermakarizin `ntemetni];> `w;parqenoc `ncabh> ten; ne `mpixereticmoc> nem gabrihl piaggeloc.
verses.arabic: We bless your greatness, O wise Virgin; we give you greeting, with Gabriel the angel.
verses.phonetic: Ten-er-makarizin ente-met-nishti o ti-parthenos en-savy ten-ti ne em-pi-kheretizmos nem Gabriyel pi-angelos

verses.coptic: Je `ebol\iten pekarpoc> a pioujai ta\e pengenoc> a `vnou; \otpen `erof `nkecop> \iten tefmetagaqoc.
verses.arabic: For through your fruit, salvation has reached our race; and God has reconciled us again to Him, through His goodness.
verses.phonetic: Je evol-hiten pe-karpos a pi-ougai tahe pen-genos a ef-nouti hotpen erof en-kesop hiten tef-met-agathos

verses.coptic: Xere qheqme\ `n`\mot> xere qhetcajem `\mot> xere qhetacmec Pixrictoc> ouo\ ` Psoic ]op neme
verses.arabic: Hail to you, O full of grace; Hail to you, who have found grace; Hail to you, who have given birth to Christ; the Lord is with you.

verses.arabic: Taste and see that the Lord is good

verses.arabic: Hail to you, O full of grace; Hail to you, who have found grace; Hail to you, who have given birth to Christ; the Lord is with you.
verses.phonetic: Shere thi-ethmeh en-hmot shere thi-etas-ajem hmot shere thi-etas-mes pi-khristos ouoh ep-chois shop neme

verses.coptic: Jem;pi ouo\ anau je ou\elje pe `psoic
verses.arabic: Taste and see that the Lord is good
verses.phonetic: Jem-tipi ouoh anav je ou-helje pe ep-chois

verses.arabic: Take heed to yourself and to the doctrine
Be ready
Having the eyes of your hearts enlightened

verses.coptic: 'en `vran `m`viwt Nem `p]hri Nem Pi`pneuma Eqouab Ounou; `nouwt amhn
verses.arabic: In the name of the Father, and the Son, and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
verses.phonetic: Khen efran em-efiout nem epshiri nem pi-pneuma ethouab ounouti enouot amen

verses.coptic: :atqwleb `ncemne> ouo\ eqouab 'en \wb niben> Qhetac`ini nan `m`vnou;> eftalhout `ejen nec`jvoi.
verses.arabic: O pure and chaste one, and holy in all things, you who brought us God, carried on your arms.
verses.phonetic: Ti-at-thouleb en-semne ouoh ethouab khen hmot niven thi-etas-ini nan em-efnouti ef-tale-iout ejen nes-egvoi

verses.coptic: `Cra]I neme `nje ;kthcic thrc> Ecw] `ebol ecjw `mmoc> je xere qheqme\ `n\mot> Ouo\ ` Psoic ]op neme.
verses.arabic: Rejoice with us, O all creation, crying out and saying: Hail to you, O full of grace, the Lord is with you.
verses.phonetic: Esrashi neme enje ti-ktisis tirs es-osh evol es-go em-mos je shere thi-ethmeh en-hmot ouoh epchois shop neme

verses.coptic: Xere qheqme\ `n`\mot> xere qhetcajem `\mot> xere qhetacmec Pixrictoc> ouo\ ` Psoic ]op neme
verses.arabic: Hail to you, O full of grace; Hail to you, who have found grace; Hail to you, who have given birth to Christ; the Lord is with you.
verses.phonetic: Shere thi-ethmeh en-hmot shere thi-etas-ajem hmot shere thi-etas-mes pi-khristos ouoh ep-chois shop neme

verses.coptic: Tenermakarizin `ntemetni];> `w;parqenoc `ncabh> ten; ne `mpixereticmoc> nem gabrihl piaggeloc.
verses.arabic: We bless your greatness, O wise Virgin; we give you greeting, with Gabriel the angel.
verses.phonetic: Ten-er-makarizin ente-met-nishti o ti-parthenos en-savy ten-ti ne em-pi-kheretizmos nem Gabriyel pi-angelos

verses.coptic: Je `ebol\iten pekarpoc> a pioujai ta\e pengenoc> a `vnou; \otpen `erof `nkecop> \iten tefmetagaqoc.
verses.arabic: For through your fruit, salvation has reached our race; and God has reconciled us again to Him, through His goodness.
verses.phonetic: Je evol-hiten pe-karpos a pi-ougai tahe pen-genos a ef-nouti hotpen erof en-kesop hiten tef-met-agathos

verses.coptic: Xere qheqme\ `n`\mot> xere qhetcajem `\mot> xere qhetacmec Pixrictoc> ouo\ ` Psoic ]op neme
verses.arabic: Hail to you, O full of grace; Hail to you, who have found grace; Hail to you, who have given birth to Christ; the Lord is with you.
verses.phonetic: Shere thi-ethmeh en-hmot shere thi-etas-ajem hmot shere thi-etas-mes pi-khristos ouoh ep-chois shop neme

verses.coptic: Jem;pi ouo\ anau je ou\elje pe `psoic
verses.arabic: Taste and see that the Lord is good
verses.phonetic: Jem-tipi ouoh anav je ou-helje pe ep-chois

verses.arabic: Take heed to yourself and to the doctrine
Be ready
Having the eyes of your hearts enlightened
In all these things we are more than conquerors through him who loved us (Rom 8:37)

verses.coptic: "en `vran `m`viwt Nem `p]hri Nem Pi`pneuma Eqouab Ounou; `nouwt amhn
verses.arabic: In the name of the Father, and the Son, and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
verses.phonetic: Khen efran em-efiout nem epshiri nem pi-epnevma ethouab ounouti enouot amin

verses.arabic: In all these things we are more than conquerors through him who loved us (Rom 8:37)

verses.coptic: "en `vran `m`viwt Nem `p]hri Nem Pi`pneuma Eqouab Ounou; `nouwt amhn
verses.arabic: In the name of the Father, and the Son, and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
verses.phonetic: Khen efran em-efiout nem epshiri nem pi-epnevma ethouab ounouti enouot amin

verses.arabic: In all these things we are more than conquerors through him who loved us (Rom 8:37)

verses.coptic: "en `vran `m`viwt Nem `p]hri Nem Pi`pneuma Eqouab Ounou; `nouwt amhn
verses.arabic: In the name of the Father, and the Son, and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
verses.phonetic: Khen efran em-efiout nem epshiri nem pi-epnevma ethouab ounouti enouot amin

verses.arabic: Our Father who art in heaven
Hallowed be Thy name
Thy kingdom come
Thy will be done, on earth as it is in heaven
verses.phonetic: Petehnak maref-shopi em-ef-riti khen et-fe nem hijen pi-kahi

verses.arabic: Give us this day our daily bread
verses.phonetic: Pen-wik ente rasti meif nan em-phoou

verses.arabic: In all these things we are more than conquerors through him who loved us (Rom 8:37)

verses.coptic: 'en `vran `m`viwt Nem `p]hri Nem Pi`pneuma Eqouab Ounou; `nouwt amhn
verses.arabic: In the name of the Father, and the Son, and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
verses.phonetic: Khen efran em-efiout nem epshiri nem pi-epnevma ethouab ounouti enouot amin

verses.coptic: Ouckhnh `mmhi> te Maria ;parqenoc> euxh 'en tecmh;> `nje nimetmeqreu `eten\ot.
verses.arabic: A true tabernacle is Mary the Virgin, wherein are placed the true testimonies.
verses.phonetic: Ou-skene em-mi te Maria ti-parthenos ev-ki khen tes-meti enje ni-met-methreu eten-hot

verses.arabic: The undefiled Ark, overlaid with gold on all sides, and the mercy seat of the Cherubim.
verses.phonetic: Ti-kivotos en-at-thouleb etoshg en-noub en-sasa niven nem pi-ilastirion en-sheroubimikon

verses.coptic: Pictamnoc `nnoub> ere pimanna \hp `n'htf> ic pilogoc `nte `viwt> `i afsicar[ `n'h;.
verses.arabic: The golden pot, wherein the manna was hidden, is the Word of the Father, who came and took flesh of you.
verses.phonetic: Pi-stamnios en-noub ere pi-manna hip en-khitf is pi-loghos ente ef-iot e af-chi-sarx en-khiti

verses.coptic: Jem;pi ouo\ anau je ou\elje pe `psoic
verses.arabic: Taste and see that the Lord is good
verses.phonetic: Jem-tipi ouoh anav je ou-helje pe ep-chois

verses.arabic: Take heed to yourself and to the doctrine
Be ready
Having the eyes of your hearts enlightened

verses.coptic: 'en `vran `m`viwt Nem `p]hri Nem Pi`pneuma Eqouab Ounou; `nouwt amhn

verses.phonetic: Pi-stamnios en-noub ere pi-manna hip en-khitf is pi-loghos ente ef-iot i af-chi-sarx en-khiti

verses.arabic: The golden lampstand, carrying the true Light, which is the light of the world, unapproachable.
verses.phonetic: Ti-lykhnia en-noub et-fai kha pi-ouwini em-mi ete ef-ouwini em-pi-kozmos pi-at-eshkhont erof

verses.arabic: The golden censer, carrying the live coal of fire, and the choice incense of sweet fragrance.
verses.phonetic: Ti-shouri en-noub et-fai kha pi-jebs en-krom nem pi-stoi-noufi et-sotp en-aromata
